description:
I'M FINE! — Emotional Awareness for Men Over 30, by Rob Nugen. A practical guide to managing your emotions to strengthen relationships with loved ones… and yourself.

This is Rob's own book, and the signature item of the series — an emotional-awareness book headlining a goodbye party, signed and personalized by the author at the event.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- A signed, personalized copy straight from the author.
- The thematic centerpiece of the Mindful Sayonara Sale, paired with the meditation segment.
name: I'M FINE!
